target.selector: iframe[srcdoc] #body_content_inner > div:nth-of-type(1) > table > tfoot > tr:nth-of-type({{n}}) > td.td

condition.statement:
let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let payment = "{{payment}}"
return checklogs === "upgrade"

let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let payment = "{{payment}}"
return checklogs === "upgrade"

target.selector: iframe[srcdoc] #body_content_inner > div:nth-of-type(3) > table > tfoot > tr:nth-of-type({{n2}}) > td.td

condition.statement:
let scenario = "{{scenario}}"
let blueSnapVs = "{{BlueSnapVs}}"
let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
let currency = "{{currency}}"
let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let renew = "{{renew}}"
blueSnapVs = blueSnapVs.split('.');
return scenario === "multi-currency" &&
(
    (
        renew !== "yes" 
        && 
        freeTrial !== "yes"
    ) 
    || 
    (
        renew === "yes" 
        && 
        (Number(blueSnapVs[0]) >= 3 && Number(blueSnapVs[1]) >= 5)
    ) 
    ||
    (
        freeTrial === "yes" 
        && 
        ( 
            currency !== "JPY" 
            || 
            (
                currency === "JPY" 
                && 
                (Number(blueSnapVs[0]) >= 3 && Number(blueSnapVs[1]) >= 5)
            )
        )
    )
)

let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let payment = "{{payment}}"
return checklogs === "upgrade"

)

let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let payment = "{{payment}}"
return checklogs === "upgrade"
